title: exomicrum axillare
side_effects: Exomicrum axillare can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe allergic reactions, nausea, and dizziness. In some cases, it can also cause irregular heartbeat, rapid breathing, and even hallucinations in individuals with pre-existing heart conditions. Prolonged use of the plant can lead to damage to the liver and kidneys, resulting in jaundice, fatigue, and other organ-related problems. Furthermore, excessive consumption of the plant's extract can lead to an increased risk of seizures and coma in vulnerable individuals.
